master-orchestrator.description: ROOT: Always-running master agent that manages all sub-agents and delegates work
master-orchestrator.prompt: Read .opencode/RULES.md and .opencode/agents/master-orchestrator.md. Always invoke sub-agents for specialized tasks - never work alone.

{{project_name}}-manager.description: Project manager under master-orchestrator - tracks tasks, decisions, and state
{{project_name}}-manager.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/{{project_name}}-manager.md and .opencode/memory/ for full context. Report status to master-orchestrator.

task-tracker.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/task-tracker.md for task management workflow. Report to {{project_name}}-manager.

state-writer.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/state-writer.md for state update workflow. Report to {{project_name}}-manager.

context-loader.description: Provides full project context from memory files under {{project_name}}-manager
context-loader.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/context-loader.md for context gathering workflow. Report to {{project_name}}-manager.

git-manager.description: Git commit/push manager under master-orchestrator - monitors changes, decides atomic commits
git-manager.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/git-manager.md for commit workflow. Report status to master-orchestrator before committing.

change-inspector.description: Analyzes git changes and categorizes them under git-manager
change-inspector.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/change-inspector.md for change analysis workflow. Report to git-manager.

quality-gate.description: Runs {{typecheck_command}} + {{build_command}} checks before commits under git-manager
quality-gate.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/quality-gate.md for quality check workflow. Report to git-manager.

commit-executor.description: Formats and executes git commits under git-manager
commit-executor.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/commit-executor.md for commit execution workflow. Report to git-manager.

{{project_name}}-builder.prompt: Read .opencode/RULES.md then .opencode/agents/{{project_name}}-context.md before making changes. Report status to master-orchestrator.

component-builder.description: Builds UI components using project's UI framework under {{project_name}}-builder
component-builder.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/component-builder.md for component patterns. Report to {{project_name}}-builder.

data-layer-builder.description: Builds API layer, DAL, hooks, database queries under {{project_name}}-builder
data-layer-builder.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/data-layer-builder.md for data layer patterns. Report to {{project_name}}-builder.

page-assembler.description: Assembles full pages from components + data + forms under {{project_name}}-builder
page-assembler.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/page-assembler.md for page patterns. Report to {{project_name}}-builder.

context-checker.description: Validates user journeys against implementation under master-orchestrator
context-checker.prompt: Read .opencode/agents/context-checker.md then project documentation for flows to validate. Report findings to master-orchestrator.
